item.title: 从成功的流程中追踪代理失败
item.summary: arXiv:2607.12747v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Failure attribution for LLM-based agentic systems, i.e., identifying which steps in a failure trajectory caused the task to fail, is critical for debugging and improving these systems.
